Pharmacy ERP Software Batches Expiry Inventory

Medicine Expiry Management Efficiently track the expiry of all your medication items to minimize inventory loss with our advanced pharmacy store management software. Our pharmacy ERP system meticulous...

Join 60+ Retail pharmacies who trust our Pharmacy ERP Software

Medicine Expiry Management Efficiently track the expiry of all your medication items to minimize inventory loss with our advanced pharmacy store management software. Our pharmacy ERP system meticulously monitors every item's expiry date from purchase through to sales. Gain complete visibility over stock that is approaching expiration, ensuring timely removal from shelves and reducing the risk of compliance issues. Our location-wise expiry reports provide detailed insights, allowing you to proactively manage inventory and adhere to national health regulations. By streamlining expiry tracking, our software helps maintain regulatory compliance and optimizes inventory management, protecting both your business and your customers.

Medicine Expiry Management

Efficiently track the expiry of all your medication items to minimize inventory loss with our advanced pharmacy store management software. Our pharmacy ERP system meticulously monitors every item's expiry date from purchase through to sales. Gain complete visibility over stock that is approaching expiration, ensuring timely removal from shelves and reducing the risk of compliance issues. Our location-wise expiry reports provide detailed insights, allowing you to proactively manage inventory and adhere to national health regulations. By streamlining expiry tracking, our software helps maintain regulatory compliance and optimizes inventory management, protecting both your business and your customers.

Multiple Locations

Manage your business seamlessly across multiple locations with real-time data on purchases and sales using our advanced pharmacy ERP software. Enable your back-office employees to work remotely as needed, ensuring flexibility and continuity. Our software is easily extendable, allowing you to create and manage multiple stores or warehouses under one company. Effortlessly hold or sell stock from each warehouse while tracking inventory levels and valuation rates by location. Configure the system to analyze expenses, monitor stock movements, and evaluate profits and losses, providing detailed insights into profitability for each location. Optimize your operations and drive efficiency with our comprehensive ERP solution.

Multiple Sales Channels

Our pharmacy ERP software is designed to handle both B2B retail sales and B2C wholesale operations with ease. It features comprehensive credit facility management to efficiently manage various types of credit-based customers. Retail businesses can benefit from our cloud-based solution, which allows you to extend your point of sale to any location worldwide. With just a few clicks, you can set up and manage sales channels from anywhere, anytime. This flexibility ensures that your operations run smoothly and your sales reach new markets, all while maintaining effective control over inventory and customer credit management.

Comprehensive Inventory Control

Minimize business losses by maintaining tight control over your inventory with our advanced pharmacy store management software. Effectively reduce theft, misplacement, and incorrect valuation that directly impact your current assets. Our comprehensive stock and inventory control module ensures precise tracking of items from purchase through warehousing to sales. The system supports valuation methods such as FIFO and Moving Average, helping you manage inventory more accurately. Integrated features provide a real-time view of product availability, stock levels across warehouses, and stock transfers. Enhance operational efficiency, prevent damages, and safeguard your business assets with our robust inventory management solution.

Automated Accounting

Our pharmacy ERP software is supported by a comprehensive international standard accounting system, ensuring full compliance with IFRS standards. The system automates ledger entries, minimizing manual data entry and enhancing accuracy. Key features include a detailed Chart of Accounts, management of Opening Account Balances, Taxes, Advance Payments, Budgeting, and Subscription Management. It also provides automatic VAT calculations and generates VAT reports in line with local taxation laws. You can drill down Profit and Loss and Balance Sheet reports by branch, while Accounts Payable and Receivable reports help manage cash flow effectively. The software also offers concise credit facilities per supplier and precise item valuation, including all indirect costs, to accurately assess profitability per item.

Offline Point of Sales Terminal

Ensure uninterrupted sales operations even during internet disruptions with our robust Point of Sale (POS) system. Users can continue serving customers seamlessly without affecting sales transactions. Once the internet connection is restored, the system automatically synchronizes data, posting both accounting and stock entries. Our POS module features a clear, intuitive interface with easy search capabilities and a single checkout screen for efficient sales transactions and commonly used tasks. Compatible with any device, our user-friendly POS software is highly flexible and fully integrated with your inventory for real-time retail management. This ensures a smooth, reliable, and efficient sales process at all times.

Pharmacy ERP Software

Our comprehensive software solution is designed to effectively manage your retail pharmacies and warehouses. It encompasses a wide range of features, including purchase, sales, stock management, accounts, and more. Over the years, we have dedicated significant effort to customizing our application to meet local business needs. While our system covers most scenarios, we understand that some businesses may have unique requirements. We recommend customization only when it addresses specific, real needs and provides savings that outweigh the costs. Our goal is to ensure that your investment delivers maximum value and aligns perfectly with your business operations.
